privileged_info_summary: The task defines a well-structured Spring Framework refactoring exercise. All metadata paths and dependency names are verified correct. The project uses real, stable library versions: Spring Framework 6.0.11 (released July 2023), JUnit 5.9.2 (released January 2023), Mockito 5.3.1 (released April 2023), and IntelliJ IDEA 2024.3.1.1 (released January 2025). The synthetic project correctly demonstrates field injection with @Autowired on three private fields (InventoryService, PaymentGateway, NotificationService). The test file properly uses @InjectMocks, which will support constructor-based injection after refactoring. The verifier logic correctly checks for: 1) compilation success, 2) test passage, 3) fields marked 'final', 4) presence of public constructor, and 5) removal of @Autowired from fields.
